title: sideritis fruticulosa subsp. cavanillesii
intro: Sideritis fruticulosa subsp. cavanillesii, also known as Spanish ironwort or Cavanilles ironwort, is a plant species in the genus Sideritis, native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis fruticulosa subsp. cavanillesii include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
